mapper.select: SELECT CONVERSATION_ID, CONVERSATION_TITLE, CRE_DT, UPD_DT, CRE_USR_ID, UPD_USR_ID FROM CONVERSATION WHERE 1=1 AND CO_ID = #{coId} AND CRE_USR_ID = #{usrId} ORDER BY UPD_DT DESC
SELECT MSG_ID, MSG_CNTNT, MSG_SNDR, CRE_DT, UPD_DT, CRE_USR_ID, UPD_USR_ID FROM MESSAGE WHERE CONVERSATION_ID = #{conversationId} ORDER BY CRE_DT ASC
SELECT MSG_ID, MSG_CNTNT, MSG_SNDR, CRE_DT, UPD_DT, CRE_USR_ID, UPD_USR_ID FROM MESSAGE WHERE CONVERSATION_ID = #{conversationId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ai.message ( msg_id, conversation_id, msg_sndr, msg_cntnt, sort_order, co_id, cre_usr_id, cre_dt, upd_usr_id, upd_dt ) VALUES
( #{msg.msgId}, #{msg.conversationId}, #{msg.msgSndr}, #{msg.msgCntnt}, #{msg.sortOrder}, #{msg.coId}, #{msg.creUsrId}, now(), #{msg.updUsrId}, now() )

INSERT INTO MESSAGE ( CO_ID, CONVERSATION_ID, MSG_ID, MSG_CNTNT, MSG_SNDR, CRE_USR_ID, UPD_USR_ID, CRE_DT, UPD_DT ) VALUES ( #{coId}, #{conversationId}, #{msgId}, #{msgCntnt}, #{msgSndr}, #{creUsrId}, #{updUsrId}, NOW(), NOW() )

INSERT INTO CONVERSATION ( CO_ID, CONVERSATION_ID, CONVERSATION_TITLE, CRE_USR_ID, UPD_USR_ID, CRE_DT, UPD_DT ) VALUES ( #{coId}, #{conversationId}, #{conversationTitle}, #{creUsrId}, #{updUsrId}, NOW(), NOW() )
